sp_widget.name: IDP Bob Home Enhanced
sp_widget.template:
Welcome back, {{data.userFirstName}}

{{data.primaryPersona}} • Your central hub for building, deploying, and managing applications

Your Workspaces

{{tile.title}}

{{tile.description}}

Platform Insights

Recent Deployments

{{data.deploymentCount}}
{{deploy.name}}
{{deploy.status === 'success' ? 'Success' : 'In Progress'}} • {{deploy.env}} • {{deploy.time}}
View all deployments

Active Incidents

{{data.incidentCount}}
{{incident.number}}: {{incident.title}}
{{incident.priority}} • Assigned to {{incident.assignee}}

{{approval.type}} • {{approval.requester}} • {{approval.age}}

Security Findings

{{data.securityCount}}
{{finding.title}}
{{finding.severity | uppercase}} • {{finding.component}} • {{finding.age}}
View all findings

Ask Platform AI

Get instant answers about deployments, troubleshooting, best practices, and more. Your intelligent assistant for platform operations.
